error.notRemoteSSH: This feature is only available in Remote-SSH environment. Please connect to a remote server using Remote-SSH first.
error.notRemoteEnvironment: This feature is only available in Remote-SSH or Remote-WSL environment. Please connect to a remote server or WSL first.
error.noWorkspace: No workspace folder found. Please open a folder first.
error.connectionFailed: Failed to connect to remote server: {0}
error.wslDistroNotRunning: WSL distribution '{0}' is not running. Start it with: wsl -d {0}
error.pathTooLong: Path too long for Windows ({0} chars): {1}
error.localPathInvalid: Must be a Windows absolute path (e.g., D:\projects\myapp)
error.syncIntervalInvalid: Sync interval must be between 10 and 3600 seconds
error.backupCountInvalid: Backup count must be between 1 and 10
error.testConnectionMissingFields: Please enter host and username to test connection
dialog.sshHost: Enter SSH host (name from ~/.ssh/config or IP address)
dialog.confirmOverwrite: Local file has been modified. Create backup before overwriting?
dialog.confirmDelete: Remote file was deleted. Delete local file?
notification.syncError: Sync error occurred. Click to view logs.
notification.connectionLost: Connection to remote server lost. Attempting to reconnect...
hint.password: Optional. Leave empty to use SSH key authentication.
hint.localPath: Windows absolute path where files will be synced
hint.backupCount: Number of backup versions to keep for locally modified files before overwriting (Range: 1-10)
hint.autoStart: Automatically start syncing when VSCode opens
hint.startAfterSave: Automatically start syncing after saving configuration
test.errorTimeout: Connection timeout. Please check host and port.
test.errorAuth: Authentication failed. Please check username and password.
test.errorRefused: Connection refused. Please check if SSH server is running.
test.errorUnreachable: Host unreachable. Please check network connection.
test.errorHostKey: Host key verification failed. Please verify the host key.
